## Lean CRM {{VERSION}}

### Download

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| macOS (drag to Applications) | `LeanCRM.dmg` |
| Windows (installer) | `LeanCRM_Setup.exe` |

**macOS note:** If Gatekeeper blocks the app, right-click → Open → Open.
**Windows note:** If SmartScreen warns you, click More info → Run anyway.
